Company.title: Company
Company.description: A shared company workspace / partition for friends splitting bills.

id.description: Strongly validated unique G-Code / invite code for the group.

name.description: The name of the company or group.

driveUrl.description: Shared cloud drive directory link for company materials.

Member.title: Member
Member.description: A teammate within a specific shared company workspace.

id.description: Unique auto-generated ID or user Auth UID.

companyId.description: ID of the parent company workspace.

name.description: The nickname/display name of the team member.

roleGroup.description: Work group or business division (e.g., 財務, 營運, 設計, 研發).

linePayInfo.description: LINE Pay ID, phone number or receiving text.

Schedule.title: Schedule
Schedule.description: A team meeting scheduler event recorded in the Bulletin calendar.

id.description: Secure YYYYMMDD code or auto-id of the appointment.

companyId.description: ID of the company workspace this event belongs to.

title.description: The description/topic of the scheduled company appointment.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: A business transaction recorded under the Accounting Counter.

companyId.description: ID of the referencing company workspace.

name.description: The item description or merchant name.

category.description: Cost classification type (e.g., 伙食, 交通, 租金, 辦公, 娛樂).

payerId.description: Member ID who pre-paid or paid the actual money.

splitWith.description: List of Member UIDs splitting the expense balance.

Repayment.title: Repayment
Repayment.description: A payment compensation record reducing shared company debt.

fromMemberId.description: The member ID paying back the money.

toMemberId.description: The member ID receiving the returned payment.

amount.description: Total amount reimbursed in this record.

status.description: Cleared logs are manually crossed out but editable (可回溯).

companies/{companyId}/schedules/{schedul.description: Subcollection mapping upcoming group schedule appointments.

companies/{companyId}/expenses/{expenseI.description: Subcollection processing transaction receipts and debtor distributions.
